mapper.select: SELECT wp.wp_id as wpId, wp.wp_name as wpName, wp.wp_type as wpTypeNo, wt.wp_type_name as wpType, wp.wp_img as wpImg, ghp.ghp_id AS ghpId, ghp.GHP_NAME AS ghpName, wt.wp_type_content as wpTypeContent FROM workplace wp LEFT OUTER JOIN wp_type wt ON wp.wp_type = wt.wp_type_no LEFT OUTER JOIN ghp ghp ON wp.wp_id = ghp.ghp_wpid WHERE upper(wp.WP_ID) = upper(#{wpId})
select count(*) from ghp_log glog left outer join ghp ghp on glog.glog_ghp = ghp.ghp_id where upper(ghp.ghp_wpid) = upper(#{wpId})

SELECT glog.glog_id glogId, glog.glog_date glogDate, glog.glog_worker glogWorker, glog.glog_value glogValue, glog.glog_result glogResult, glog.glog_action glogAction, glog.glog_adate glogAdate, glog.glog_img glogImg, glog.glog_memo glogMemo, glog.glog_cdate glogCdate, ghp.ghp_id ghpId, ghp.ghp_name ghpName, ghp.ghp_category ghpCategory, ghp.ghp_standard ghpStandard, ghp.ghp_check_method ghpCheckMethod, ghp.ghp_cycle ghpCycle, ghp.ghp_whid ghpWhId, ghp.ghp_wpid ghpWpId, ghp.GHP_MIN_VALUE ghpMinValue, ghp.GHP_MAX_VALUE ghpMaxValue, ghp.ghp_unit ghpUnit FROM ghp_log glog LEFT OUTER JOIN GHP ghp ON glog.GLOG_GHP = ghp.GHP_ID WHERE upper(ghp.ghp_wpid) = upper(#{wpId})
